○ Uvhash
    ■ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": Base DMG dealt by Uvhash is increased from 3%~30% to 10%~50%.
    ■ Exalt "Hymn of Blood and Sand": Base Strength multiplier increased from 3 to 5, Aliemus Regen Effect increased from 100% to 200%.
    ■ Absolute Axiom "Paean of Twisted Fury": Final DMG increased from 25% to 35%.

if you're trying to say this type
"aku dah selesai cok"
It's like to learn Indonesian again
its just a mix of shortened and multi-regional slang words
aku is informal way for saying me
cok is "jancok" a javanese swear word, but lost its meaning as of now and assimilated into popular senntence endings
